local_diagram: Cursor-Project/config/Diagrams/Bundle 5/EPRO - Splitting Final  - create invoice for product contract-Price application model for volumes-Interim.drawio.svg (page: Price application model for volumes)
scope: Product contract standard billing run — invoice creation for Price application model for volumes (BY_SCALES splitting path), including interim/advance-payment branch when billing run application model includes INTERIM_AND_ADVANCE_PAYMENT. Per-split validation: contract status, application model type on price component, price formula (fixed vs price profile/price parameter), billing-data-by-profile availability, dimension compatibility, numeric formula result, and percentage volume restrictions.
entry_points: PATCH /billing-run/start-generation (BillingRunStartGenerationService — follows billing when RunStage includes GENERATE_AND_SIGN)
Product contract configuration: ProductContractBasicParametersService (untilVolume/hasUntilVolume), ProductContractProductParametersService (interim advance payments on contract third tab)

upstream.name: billing_run.run_standard_billing_main_data_preparation
upstream.usage: Prepares standard billing run contract/split/slot rows before Java generation

upstream.name: billing_run.run_standard_billing_interim_data_preparation
upstream.usage: Prepares billing_run_interim_data rows for interim invoice generation

upstream.name: price_component.application_models / am_for_volumes_by_scales / am_for_volumes_by_settlement_periods (+ restriction range tables)
upstream.usage: Price component application model config; restriction queries in BillingRunContractsRepository (kWh/CCY/percent)

upstream.name: pod.billing_data_by_profile
upstream.usage: Price profile values for $PRICE_PROFILE$ in scale/settlement evaluation (BillingDataByProfileRepository.findPriceProfileByPodIdForExactDateWithType)

upstream.name: product_contract.contracts / contract_details / contract_pods
upstream.usage: Product contract version, status (incl. TERMINATED), POD bindings for billing run scope

upstream.name: BillingRunPriceComponentEvaluationService
upstream.usage: OGNL price formula evaluation; injects X variables, price parameters, price profile

upstream.name: InterimAdvancePaymentService / ProductService
upstream.usage: Interim advance payment definitions on product; copied to product contract

upstream.name: ExpressionStringParser / AbstractPriceComponentPriceEvaluationStrategy
upstream.usage: Shared price formula parsing and evaluation

upstream.name: product ApplicationModelType: PRICE_AM_FOR_VOLUMES, PRICE_AM_OVERTIME, PRICE_AM_PER_PIECE
upstream.usage: Price component product-side application model type

upstream.name: billing ApplicationModelType: FOR_VOLUMES, INTERIM_AND_ADVANCE_PAYMENT, …
upstream.usage: Billing run selected application models; drives handler routing in BillingRunStandardPreparationStateHandler

downstream.name: invoice.invoices + invoice.invoice_standard_detailed_data
downstream.usage: Draft REAL invoices; INTERIM_AND_ADVANCE_PAYMENT vs STANDARD detail types

downstream.name: InvoiceService.generateExcel
downstream.usage: Called after interim processing completes (DRAFT invoices)

downstream.name: BillingRunStartGenerationService
downstream.usage: Auto-chained when billing run reaches DRAFT and RunStage includes GENERATE_AND_SIGN

downstream.name: CustomerLiabilityMapperService / receivable flows
downstream.usage: Liabilities created on invoice accounting (outside generation scope but regression-sensitive)

downstream.name: Billing run screens + product contract create/edit (interimAdvancePayments, untilVolume)
downstream.usage: User configures contract/product parameters consumed by preparation procedures

downstream.name: Invoice cancellation / reversal / correction billing runs
downstream.usage: Reuse FOR_VOLUMES paths with INVOICE_CORRECTION type in BillingRunStandardInvoiceGenerationProcessor

shared: phoenix-core-lib billingRun package (BillingRunStandardInvoiceGenerationProcessor, BillingRunProcessScaleCalculationService, BillingRunProcessSettlementService, BillingRunInterimProcessingService)
BillingRunContractsRepository.updateBgInvoiceSlotStatus — per-slot ERROR propagation without stopping entire run
data_entities: billing_run (billings, billing_run_contracts, billing_run_bdbs_splits_io_data, billing_run_settlement_period, billing_run_interim_data, bg_invoice_slot status)
integration_points: Billing run creation with applicationModelType containing FOR_VOLUMES and/or INTERIM_AND_ADVANCE_PAYMENT → start-billing → preparation procedures → generation processor

FOR_VOLUMES product contract: settlement periods (BY_SETTLEMENT_PERIODS) and/or scale splits (BY_SCALES) → restriction calculation (kWh/CCY/percent) → discount processing → group by bgInvoiceSlotId → generateInvoice per slot
Scale split path: BillingRunBdbsSplitsIoData → month splits when price formula uses $PRICE_PROFILE$ or price-parameter tokens → evaluateExpression → meter-reading split adjustments

Interim path: billing_run_interim_data rows (EXACT_AMOUNT | PRICE_COMPONENT | PERCENT_FROM_PREVIOUS_INVOICE_AMOUNT) → parallel executor → draft INTERIM_AND_ADVANCE_PAYMENT invoice linked to productContractId/detailId
Failed slot isolation: failedSlots set + updateBgInvoiceSlotStatus(ERROR, message) — other slots continue
STANDARD_WITH_INTERIM: BillingRunStandardPreparationStateHandler runs standard generation then interim preparation/generation in sequence

what_could_break.reason: Diagram expects slot-level errors with continuation; code uses failedSlots but contract row can still set processingStatus FAILED on unhandled exceptions
Missing billing_data_by_profile throws RuntimeException → slot ERROR; message differs from diagram wording
Explicitly throws if formula contains $PRICE_PROFILE$ — interim IAP cannot use price profile even if product PC supports volumes/scales model
Throws 'Price wasn't calculated because of missing data' when previous 30 days not filled — different from standard scale/settlement messaging
Two enums with different names; mapping between PRICE_AM_FOR_VOLUMES and FOR_VOLUMES happens in preparation/SQL — test data must set both sides consistently

what_could_break.location: Diagram gate 'contract status is terminated' vs ProductContractRepository billing eligibility queries
what_could_break.reason: Repository still includes TERMINATED in some billing lookups; diagram implies branch/skip — verify preparation procedure vs Java alignment
Diagram calls out percentage restriction volume/amount; incorrect restriction math affects invoice totals and slot zero-volume removal (finalRestrictionVolume == 0)
TODO uses LocalDate.now() for global VAT lookup instead of billing run invoice date — environment/date-sensitive regression
Alignment lock prevented test-branch sync; code evidence may not match Test environment deployment

discrepancies.area: Error message — missing billing data by profile
discrepancies.diagram: error for invoice slot: data is missing in billing data by profile with ID for billing data by profile
discrepancies.code: RuntimeException: Price profile not found for PodId: {podId} and date: {startDayOfMonth} (BillingRunProcessScaleCalculationService.scaleExtractProfilePrice)
discrepancies.impact_risk: UI/protocol/error-report tests keyed to diagram text will not match backend messages; support triage confusion

discrepancies.diagram: error in invoice slot: Price can't be calculated for selected dimension and continue process for other slots
discrepancies.code: No exact string in Java billingRun package; closest: 'price cannot not be evaluated, invalid formula' (BillingRunPriceComponentEvaluationService) or preparation-layer/SQL messages not visible in repo Java
discrepancies.impact_risk: Acceptance criteria may reference message not implemented in Java layer; verify DB procedure output

discrepancies.diagram: Checks price profile/price parameter usage in price formula for volumes/scales splits
discrepancies.code: BillingRunInterimProcessingService rejects $PRICE_PROFILE$ outright for interim PRICE_COMPONENT calculations
discrepancies.impact_risk: Task scope mixing standard volumes invoice + interim invoice may expect unified formula support; interim path is stricter

discrepancies.diagram: application model type is Price application model for volumes and application type is by scales
discrepancies.code: Product: ApplicationModelType.PRICE_AM_FOR_VOLUMES + ApplicationType.BY_SCALES; Billing run: ApplicationModelType.FOR_VOLUMES
discrepancies.impact_risk: Test preconditions must configure product PC and billing run applicationModelType consistently

discrepancies.diagram: price include only fixed variable (when no price profile/parameter)
discrepancies.code: processDefault in scale service evaluates formula with X variables only; interim PRICE_COMPONENT requires X1-X10 fixed values (no ranges)
discrepancies.impact_risk: Partially aligned but different validation surfaces (interim vs standard scale)

diagram_flow_summary: For each split check application model type in price component
application model type is Price application model for volumes and application type is by scales
check price formula for price profile or price parameter usage
if profile/parameter: validate dimension vs billing data by profile; missing data → slot error
if fixed-only: evaluate formula → must return one numeric result
Restriction type: Percentage restriction → calculate restricted volume and amount
On price calculation failure for dimension → slot error, continue other slots
technical_details: Endpoints: /billing-run/start-billing, /billing-run/start-generation, billing run CRUD under /billing-run (BillingRunController). Core services: BillingRunStandardPreparationStateHandler, BillingRunStandardPreparationService (procedures billing_run.run_standard_billing_main_data_preparation, billing_run.run_standard_billing_interim_data_preparation), BillingRunStandardInvoiceGenerationProcessor, BillingRunProcessScaleCalculationService, BillingRunProcessSettlementService, BillingRunInterimProcessingService, BillingRunPriceComponentEvaluationService. Key enums: billing.billings.ApplicationModelType {FOR_VOLUMES, INTERIM_AND_ADVANCE_PAYMENT, …}, product ApplicationModelType {PRICE_AM_FOR_VOLUMES, …}, ApplicationType {BY_SCALES, BY_SETTLEMENT_PERIODS, …}, InvoiceType.INTERIM_AND_ADVANCE_PAYMENT, InvoiceStandardDetailType {INTERIM_EXACT_AMOUNT, INTERIM_PRICE_COMPONENT, …}, BillingType.STANDARD_BILLING, ContractDetailsStatus.TERMINATED. DB tables/schemas (from repositories): billing.billings (application_model_type), price_component.am_for_volumes_by_scales*, pod.billing_data_by_profile, invoice.invoices, billing_run_interim_data (entity). Restriction SQL: BillingRunContractsRepository getScaleRestrictionByKwh/Ccy/Percent, getSettlementRestriction*. Jira ticket text, acceptance criteria, linked Confluence, and attachments were NOT retrieved — parent should supply ticket export or configure Jira credentials for full Rule 35a Jira anchoring.
